title: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - May 23, 2023
section_path: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - May 23, 2023
section_path_text: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - May 23, 2023
summary:
Main
·Freight futures contango evaporates as optimism turns into caution - Not much has changed in the spot market during the past few weeks, yet Capesize futures took a dive and have now erased any premium that was present over the last few months. Although spot rates are trading above mid-April levels, futures are some 20% lower than the comparable period. Clearly sentiment has turned sour, as across the commodity spectrum the relatively weak numbers out of China has taken a toll on any optimism relating to an imminent rebound in activity in that part of the world.
